title: Stripe and OpenAI introduce Instant Checkout in ChatGPT
quote: Stripe and OpenAI built the open-source Agentic Commerce Protocol to power Instant Checkout in ChatGPT.

title: Buy it in ChatGPT: Instant Checkout and the Agentic Commerce Protocol
quote: Instant Checkout lets ChatGPT users buy from Etsy sellers directly in chat, with Shopify merchants next.

title: Stripe launches Agentic Commerce Suite
quote: Stripe launched Agentic Commerce Suite, including Shared Payment Tokens, Identity for Agents, and agent commerce tools.

title: Agentic commerce
quote: Stripe frames agentic commerce as enabling AI agents to search, recommend, and complete purchases for users.

title: Agentic Commerce Protocol
quote: Stripe describes ACP as a shared language between merchants and AI agents for commerce flows.

title: Shared Payment Tokens
quote: Shared Payment Tokens are described as limited-use payment tokens for agent-initiated commerce flows.

title: Agentic commerce
quote: Stripe positions agentic commerce around helping businesses sell through AI agents and assistants.

title: Stripe MCP server
quote: The Stripe MCP server lets AI agents access Stripe APIs through the Model Context Protocol.

title: stripe/agent-toolkit
quote: Stripe Agent Toolkit enables agent frameworks to integrate with Stripe APIs through typed tools.

title: Machine payments
quote: Stripe lists payments for AI agents, autonomous bots, and API services under machine payments.

title: x402 payments
quote: Stripe documents x402 as an HTTP-native payment flow for machine-to-machine payments.

title: Link for AI agents
quote: Link positions its agent wallet as a way for people to pay through agents using saved payment details.

title: Stripe 2025 annual letter
quote: Stripe reported $1.4 trillion in total payment volume in 2024 and highlighted AI companies as fast-growing users.

title: Stripe completes Bridge acquisition
quote: Stripe completed its acquisition of Bridge, a stablecoin infrastructure company, in February 2025.

title: Privy and Stripe: Bringing crypto to everyone
quote: Privy announced that Stripe was acquiring Privy and that Privy would continue as an independent product.

title: Stripe completes Metronome acquisition
quote: Stripe completed its Metronome acquisition, adding usage-based billing infrastructure for complex pricing models.

title: Visa Unveils Visa Intelligent Commerce to Accelerate AI-Driven Commerce
quote: Visa Intelligent Commerce is described as opening Visa's network to developers building AI commerce experiences.

title: Mastercard Agent Pay to power AI commerce
quote: Mastercard Agent Pay is a program for AI-assisted shopping and payments using tokenization and controls.

title: Announcing the Agent Payments Protocol (AP2)
quote: Google described AP2 as an open protocol for payments initiated by AI agents across platforms.

title: PayPal and OpenAI team up to power Instant Checkout in ChatGPT
quote: PayPal said it would power Instant Checkout in ChatGPT for PayPal wallet users and merchants.

title: x402 documentation
quote: Coinbase documents x402 as an open protocol for internet-native payments using HTTP 402.

title: x402 Foundation
quote: The x402 Foundation positions x402 as an open standard for HTTP-native internet payments.

title: OpenAI's ChatGPT now lets users buy from Etsy, Shopify
quote: AP reported that OpenAI worked with Stripe on technical standards for Instant Checkout purchases.

title: OpenAI takes on Google, Amazon with new agentic shopping system
quote: TechCrunch reported that Instant Checkout initially supported US Etsy sellers, with Shopify merchants coming soon.

title: Affirm expands Stripe partnership to support Shared Payment Tokens
quote: Affirm said its Stripe partnership would support Shared Payment Tokens for agentic commerce payments.

title: Klarna expands further into agentic commerce
quote: Klarna said it would support Stripe Shared Payment Tokens for agentic commerce payment options.

title: Stripe builds out the economic infrastructure for AI with 288 launches
quote: Stripe announced Link wallets for agents and a Google partnership for AI Mode and Gemini commerce.

title: SoK: Security of Autonomous LLM Agents in Agentic Commerce
quote: The SoK frames agentic commerce security as cross-layer controls across LLMs, protocols, identity, markets, and regulation.

title: Zero-Trust Runtime Verification for Agentic Payment Protocols
quote: The paper identifies runtime enforcement gaps around replay and context binding in agent payment protocols.

title: Stripe, OpenRouter partner to cash in on AI agents
commercetools kicks off NRF 2026 with updates on Stripe ACS
quote: commercetools said JD Sports signed on as the first enterprise retailer to use Stripe ACS.

title: Stripe launches new products to drive stablecoins and agentic commerce into the mainstream
quote: Stripe said it was working with Microsoft Copilot, Anthropic, Perplexity, Vercel, Lovable, Replit, and Manus on agentic commerce.
